claims.truth_source: netlify/functions/api-scholarships.js response summary and scholarship-platform feed metadata
claims.current_truth: Scholarship Finder public copy must show the exact API count or limited live-feed language; static 120+ claims are forbidden unless the live verified feed actually supports them.
claims.required_validation: node scripts/audit-scholarship-truth.js; node scripts/audit-public-claims.js; API response summary spot check when feed logic changes

claims.truth_source: assets/js/components/tool-registry.js and registry-derived count sync scripts
claims.current_truth: Tool-count and broad scale language must be backed by the registry and the count sync/build scripts, not hand-written copy.
claims.required_validation: npm run counts:sync when count copy changes; npm run audit:public-claims; npm test for registry-facing edits

claims.truth_source: country route inventory, tool registry country metadata, and country hub build outputs
claims.current_truth: A 54-country or all-African-country claim is allowed only for surfaces whose registry/source explicitly covers that footprint.
claims.required_validation: npm run inventory:site or the feature-specific country coverage audit before expanding public coverage copy

claims.truth_source: Fuel tracker source configuration and country coverage data
claims.current_truth: Fuel coverage language must remain tied to the maintained fuel source map and cannot imply country support without a corresponding source row.
claims.required_validation: Run the fuel tracker source/coverage check or targeted tool smoke before changing fuel country copy.

claims.truth_source: Compliance calendar country dataset and registry metadata
claims.current_truth: Compliance and filing calendar coverage must match the maintained country dataset and visible source notes.
claims.required_validation: Run the compliance calendar coverage audit or targeted data smoke before changing coverage copy.

claims.truth_source: Supabase public.recipes and public.recipe_media plus local AfroKitchen image inventory
claims.current_truth: AfroKitchen recipe and media coverage claims must reflect live recipe rows and known media coverage, or clearly say when a feature is preview/local.
claims.required_validation: Recipe/media inventory check and npm run audit:public-claims before publishing new coverage copy.

claims.truth_source: Remittance provider configuration, API availability notes, and quote freshness metadata
claims.current_truth: Remittance quote copy must distinguish live/available quotes from static provider guidance or preview-only comparisons.
claims.required_validation: Targeted remittance API/source smoke plus npm run audit:public-claims before changing availability copy.

claims.truth_source: AfroPayroll OS local workspace state, payroll API functions, and Pro readiness docs
claims.current_truth: Payroll public copy must say local-only, preview, or schema-backed accurately and must not imply live operational data without a working source.
claims.required_validation: Targeted payroll workspace smoke and npm run audit:public-claims before changing operational/live data copy.

claims.truth_source: Pro app readiness docs, local storage implementation, and account sync API status
claims.current_truth: Pro surfaces may describe local-only flows or sync-pending previews, but must not imply working account sync, reminders, alerts, or payments without a source-backed implementation.
claims.required_validation: Pro readiness review plus targeted app smoke before changing sync, alert, payment, or reminder copy.

claims.truth_source: AI advisor function, consent gate, plan entitlement copy, and tool registry capability metadata
claims.current_truth: AI advisor claims are allowed only for surfaces wired to the shared AI advisor pathway or explicitly marked as capability metadata.
claims.required_validation: Targeted AI advisor smoke plus npm run audit:public-claims before changing plan or capability copy.

claims.truth_source: data/government/official-sources.json, data/transport/official-sources.json, generated source-status JSON, and source-ledger GitHub Actions
claims.current_truth: Government and transport linked-workflow, official-source, and last-review claims must match the source manifests and generated source-ledger status/report outputs.
claims.required_validation: npm run government:sources:check; npm run transport:sources:check; npm run audit:automation-registry

claims.truth_source: Feature-specific source manifests, generated source ledgers, and visible source review notes
claims.current_truth: Public copy that promises official source links must point users to maintained source-backed references or clearly mark the workflow as review guidance.
claims.required_validation: npm run audit:public-claims plus the feature-specific source-ledger or compliance-source check before changing official-source copy.

claims.truth_source: Feature-specific API functions, data freshness metadata, and visible source/fallback labels
claims.current_truth: Live data and real-time language must be backed by a source, freshness label, or explicit preview/fallback state for the specific feature.
claims.required_validation: Feature-specific live data smoke plus npm run audit:public-claims before changing freshness copy.
